content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates multiple specific, timely reads that precede questions. In turn 6 they name the linguistic pattern ('pretty good' and 'fine' repeated). In turn 8 they catch the micro-moment of something almost-said and pause on it ('it looked like something else might have been coming, and then it didn't quite make it out') — a textbook somatic/energetic read at the moment it mattered. In turn 12 they name the quality of the words themselves ('compatible, works, get along well... words you might use to describe a really good living situation, or a reliable car') — distinguishing the said from the shown. In turn 14 they catch the defensive explanation ('you just explained yourself... you didn't need to defend yourself to me') — a clear defensiveness-as-signal read. Each read precedes the question rather than being a blind inquiry. The coach missed naming the happiness-filter pattern explicitly and didn't surface walking-on-eggshells, but the reads that are present are specific, AoA-flavored, and timely.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic tell 'at home' but treats it as a content cue rather than naming it as a read."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Affirms 'open and self-aware' — takes presentation at face value without reading the surface composure."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the linguistic pattern of 'pretty good' and 'fine' explicitly before asking about aliveness — read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the micro-moment of the unspoken thing in real time and pauses on it. Specific somatic/energetic read at the exact moment it changes the conversation."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects back the client's own framing ('would take us somewhere that wasn't really the point') as a tell worth examining."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the quality of the word choices — distinguishes the said from the shown ('words you might use to describe a reliable car'). Strong AoA-style read."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the defensive self-explanation as a signal ('you didn't need to defend yourself to me'). Defensiveness-as-identity-signal read, timely and specific."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter", "walking-on-eggshells", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "notes": "Reads are present, specific, and timely throughout the middle of the conversation. Coach hasn't yet named the larger happiness-filter / walking-on-eggshells pattern but the conversation is still building toward it and the foundational reads are well-placed."
}
